query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO `carrier_import_templates` (`id`, `carrier_slug`, `report_type`, `name`, `description`, `column_mappings`, `parser_type`, `sample_headers`, `is_system`, `created_by`) VALUES
('t1000001-0001-0001-0001-000000000001', 'northwestern-mutual', 'inforce_illustration', 'Northwestern Mutual — In-Force Illustration (CSV)', 'Import in-force policy illustrations from Northwestern Mutual CSV exports.', '{"policyNumber":"Policy Number","insuredName":"Insured Name","productType":"Product","faceAmount":"Face Amount","cashValue":"Cash Value","annualPremium":"Annual Premium","deathBenefit":"Death Benefit","loanBalance":"Loan Balance","issueDate":"Issue Date"}', 'csv', '["Policy Number","Insured Name","Product","Face Amount","Cash Value","Annual Premium","Death Benefit","Loan Balance","Issue Date"]', 1, NULL),
('t1000001-0001-0001-0001-000000000002', 'massmutual', 'policy_summary', 'MassMutual — Policy Summary (CSV)', 'Import policy summary data from MassMutual CSV exports.', '{"policyNumber":"Contract Number","insuredName":"Owner Name","productType":"Plan Code","faceAmount":"Specified Amount","cashValue":"Total Cash Value","annualPremium":"Planned Premium","deathBenefit":"Current Death Benefit","issueDate":"Issue Date","status":"Status"}', 'csv', '["Contract Number","Owner Name","Plan Code","Specified Amount","Total Cash Value","Planned Premium","Current Death Benefit","Issue Date","Status"]', 1, NULL),
('t1000001-0001-0001-0001-000000000003', 'prudential', 'annual_statement', 'Prudential — Annual Statement (PDF Table)', 'Extract annual statement data from Prudential PDF reports.', '{"policyNumber":"Policy No.","insuredName":"Insured","productType":"Product Type","faceAmount":"Face Amount","cashValue":"Account Value","annualPremium":"Premium","deathBenefit":"Death Benefit","issueDate":"Effective Date"}', 'pdf_table', '["Policy No.","Insured","Product Type","Face Amount","Account Value","Premium","Death Benefit","Effective Date"]', 1, NULL),
('t1000001-0001-0001-0001-000000000004', 'guardian', 'commission_statement', 'Guardian — Commission Statement (Excel)', 'Import commission data from Guardian Excel exports.', '{"policyNumber":"Policy #","agentCode":"Agent Code","insuredName":"Insured","commissionType":"Comm Type","amount":"Amount","premiumBasis":"Premium Basis","effectiveDate":"Effective","productType":"Product"}', 'excel', '["Policy #","Agent Code","Insured","Comm Type","Amount","Premium Basis","Effective","Product"]', 1, NULL),
('t1000001-0001-0001-0001-000000000005', 'transamerica', 'inforce_listing', 'Transamerica — In-Force Listing (CSV)', 'Import in-force policy listings from Transamerica CSV exports.', '{"policyNumber":"Policy Number","insuredName":"Insured Name","productType":"Plan Name","faceAmount":"Initial Face Amount","cashValue":"Surrender Value","annualPremium":"Modal Premium","deathBenefit":"Current Death Benefit","issueDate":"Issue Date","status":"Policy Status"}', 'csv', '["Policy Number","Insured Name","Plan Name","Initial Face Amount","Surrender Value","Modal Premium","Current Death Benefit","Issue Date","Policy Status"]', 1, NULL),
('t1000001-0001-0001-0001-000000000006', 'pacific-life', 'performance_report', 'Pacific Life — Performance Report (PDF OCR)', 'OCR extraction from Pacific Life performance report PDFs.', '{"policyNumber":"Contract Number","insuredName":"Contract Owner","productType":"Product","faceAmount":"Specified Amount","cashValue":"Accumulation Value","annualPremium":"Planned Premium","deathBenefit":"Death Benefit","returnRate":"Net Rate of Return"}', 'pdf_ocr', '["Contract Number","Contract Owner","Product","Specified Amount","Accumulation Value","Planned Premium","Death Benefit","Net Rate of Return"]', 1, NULL),
('t1000001-0001-0001-0001-000000000007', 'nationwide', 'client_report', 'Nationwide — Client Report (Excel)', 'Import client policy data from Nationwide Excel reports.', '{"policyNumber":"Policy Number","insuredName":"Client Name","productType":"Product Name","faceAmount":"Face Amount","cashValue":"Cash Surrender Value","annualPremium":"Annual Premium","deathBenefit":"Death Benefit Amount","issueDate":"Policy Issue Date","status":"Status"}', 'excel', '["Policy Number","Client Name","Product Name","Face Amount","Cash Surrender Value","Annual Premium","Death Benefit Amount","Policy Issue Date","Status"]', 1, NULL);
